## Meeting Purpose

[Demo Fabius.io's AI-powered customer analysis platform for GrowthX's sales and account management processes.](https://fathom.video/share/yrmeEV_fUPyVSH4WsBUzG_wAoL1ystCa?tab=summary&timestamp=99.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Fabius offers automated, scalable analysis of customer interactions (calls, emails, documents) to replace manual processes](https://fathom.video/share/yrmeEV_fUPyVSH4WsBUzG_wAoL1ystCa?tab=summary&timestamp=114.0)
  - [Platform can be customized to GrowthX's specific ICP criteria, sales stages, and health scoring needs](https://fathom.video/share/yrmeEV_fUPyVSH4WsBUzG_wAoL1ystCa?tab=summary&timestamp=114.0)
  - [Next steps: GrowthX to provide sales process docs, sample calls, and analysis criteria; Fabius to create demo with GrowthX's data](https://fathom.video/share/yrmeEV_fUPyVSH4WsBUzG_wAoL1ystCa?tab=summary&timestamp=1360.0)

## Topics

### Fabius Platform Overview

  - [Centered around configurable analysis for different customer journey stages](https://fathom.video/share/yrmeEV_fUPyVSH4WsBUzG_wAoL1ystCa?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
  - [Can analyze transcripts, documents, CRM data, and other sources](https://fathom.video/share/yrmeEV_fUPyVSH4WsBUzG_wAoL1ystCa?tab=summary&timestamp=855.0)
  - [AI-assisted creation of analysis prompts and scoring criteria](https://fathom.video/share/yrmeEV_fUPyVSH4WsBUzG_wAoL1ystCa?tab=summary&timestamp=423.0)
  - [Chat interface for ad-hoc analysis of individual/multiple calls or accounts](https://fathom.video/share/yrmeEV_fUPyVSH4WsBUzG_wAoL1ystCa?tab=summary&timestamp=637.0)

### GrowthX's Current Process

  - [Manual analysis of customer calls using ICP framework in Notion](https://fathom.video/share/yrmeEV_fUPyVSH4WsBUzG_wAoL1ystCa?tab=summary&timestamp=114.0)
  - [Recently added V1 scoring criteria for pre-deep dive intro meetings](https://fathom.video/share/yrmeEV_fUPyVSH4WsBUzG_wAoL1ystCa?tab=summary&timestamp=149.0)
  - [Tracking how ICP scoring correlates with overall health, delivery, and churn](https://fathom.video/share/yrmeEV_fUPyVSH4WsBUzG_wAoL1ystCa?tab=summary&timestamp=184.0)

### Customization for GrowthX

  - [Demo showed sample analysis fields based on GrowthX's notion document](https://fathom.video/share/yrmeEV_fUPyVSH4WsBUzG_wAoL1ystCa?tab=summary&timestamp=374.0)
  - [Scoring includes pros, cons, and suggestions for improvement](https://fathom.video/share/yrmeEV_fUPyVSH4WsBUzG_wAoL1ystCa?tab=summary&timestamp=601.0)
  - [Can update rubrics and create custom views/reports](https://fathom.video/share/yrmeEV_fUPyVSH4WsBUzG_wAoL1ystCa?tab=summary&timestamp=762.0)

### Data Sources and Integration

  - [Primary focus on call analysis from Fathom recordings](https://fathom.video/share/yrmeEV_fUPyVSH4WsBUzG_wAoL1ystCa?tab=summary&timestamp=1384.0)
  - [Potential challenges with Slack data due to contractual limitations](https://fathom.video/share/yrmeEV_fUPyVSH4WsBUzG_wAoL1ystCa?tab=summary&timestamp=918.0)
  - [Interest in connecting various touchpoints (calls, docs) for comprehensive health tracking](https://fathom.video/share/yrmeEV_fUPyVSH4WsBUzG_wAoL1ystCa?tab=summary&timestamp=1022.0)

### Health Scoring and Churn Risk Analysis

  - [Ongoing customer health scoring based on recent interactions](https://fathom.video/share/yrmeEV_fUPyVSH4WsBUzG_wAoL1ystCa?tab=summary&timestamp=1045.0)
  - [Churn risk analysis using custom indicators and internal notes](https://fathom.video/share/yrmeEV_fUPyVSH4WsBUzG_wAoL1ystCa?tab=summary&timestamp=1045.0)
  - [Automated alerts for health score drops or identified risks](https://fathom.video/share/yrmeEV_fUPyVSH4WsBUzG_wAoL1ystCa?tab=summary&timestamp=1022.0)
  - [Challenge: Incorporating GrowthX's content performance metrics into health scoring](https://fathom.video/share/yrmeEV_fUPyVSH4WsBUzG_wAoL1ystCa?tab=summary&timestamp=1183.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to provide:](https://fathom.video/share/yrmeEV_fUPyVSH4WsBUzG_wAoL1ystCa?tab=summary&timestamp=1360.0)
    1.  Documentation on sales process stages
    2.  2-3 Fathom call recordings for existing customers (client health tracking)
    3.  2-3 Fathom call recordings for prospects (sales process)
    4.  Documentation on "what good looks like" at each stage and desired analysis criteria
  - [Fabius to ingest provided data and create custom demo (1-3 days)](https://fathom.video/share/yrmeEV_fUPyVSH4WsBUzG_wAoL1ystCa?tab=summary&timestamp=1729.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up meeting mid-next week to review results](https://fathom.video/share/yrmeEV_fUPyVSH4WsBUzG_wAoL1ystCa?tab=summary&timestamp=1729.0)
  - [Post-demo: GrowthX team to get hands-on access to the platform](https://fathom.video/share/yrmeEV_fUPyVSH4WsBUzG_wAoL1ystCa?tab=summary&timestamp=1739.0)
